# Lab 4 - Word Game

A simple Python word guessing game inspired by Hangman.

## Files
- `main.py`: core game logic
- `test_update_game_state.py`: tests for the `update_game_state` function
- `MY_NOTES.md`: design thinking and Copilot notes
- `JOURNAL.md`: log of Copilot interactions
- `REPORT.md`: reflection on the lab

# Lab 4 - Word Game

## Description
A console-based word guessing game inspired by Hangman.

## Features
- random word selection
- masked word display
- guessed letters tracking
- incorrect guesses tracking
- win/lose detection
- replay support without restarting the program

## How to run the game
```bash
python .\main.py
## How to run the game
```bash
python .\main.py
